description: Revert harmful changes made by previous ralph tasks: remove global shadow utility overrides, remove over-engineered scroll affordance in tabs, fix heading spacing hierarchy, restore inline code border-2 and padding, restore hero heading size on tablets, remove bloated min-h-11 from tab triggers.
qualityChecks: cd docs && bun run build && bun run type-check && bun run lint && bun run knip

userStories.title: Remove global shadow utility class overrides on mobile
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Tailwind utility classes to behave consistently at all breakpoints so that shadow-md always means shadow-md.
acceptanceCriteria: The @media (max-width: 639px) block that overrides .shadow-md and .shadow-lg is removed from docs/app/global.css
The comment above it ('Reduce shadow offsets on mobile...') is also removed
The search dialog shadow override at @media (max-width: 639px) targeting [role='dialog'][data-state] is kept — that's a scoped selector, not a utility override
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes

userStories.title: Remove scroll affordance machinery from RetroTabs
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the tabs component to be simple — horizontal scroll with hidden scrollbar is sufficient without JS-driven gradient overlays.
acceptanceCriteria: The listRef, canScrollLeft, canScrollRight state variables are removed from RetroTabs
The updateScrollState callback and its useEffect are removed
The useRef, useCallback imports are removed (if no longer needed)
The two gradient overlay divs (from-background pointer-events-none absolute) are removed
The wrapping <div className='relative'> around RadixTabs.List is removed — RadixTabs.List is a direct child of RadixTabs.Root again
The ref={listRef} on RadixTabs.List is removed
Tab scrolling still works via overflow-x-auto and retro-tabs-list CSS class
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
userStories.notes:
In docs/components/retro-tabs.tsx, simplify the RetroTabs component by removing the scroll affordance state and effects.

Remove from line 5 imports: useCallback, useRef (keep createContext, useContext, useEffect, useId, useMemo, useState).
Actually check if useEffect is still needed — it's used by useCollectionIndex cleanup, so keep it.

Remove lines 62-84 (listRef, canScrollLeft, canScrollRight, updateScrollState, useEffect with ResizeObserver).

Replace the items rendering block (lines 96-121) with the simpler version — remove the wrapper <div className='relative'> and the two gradient divs. The RadixTabs.List should be:
```
<RadixTabs.List className="retro-tabs-list not-prose border-border flex flex-row flex-nowrap space-x-2 overflow-x-auto border-b-2 pb-0">
```
No ref, no wrapper div, no gradient overlays.

userStories.title: Remove min-h-11 from tab triggers
userStories.description: As a user, I want tabs to be compact and visually proportional, not bloated to 44px height.
acceptanceCriteria: The min-h-11 class is removed from RadixTabs.Trigger in docs/components/retro-tabs.tsx
The trigger className retains all other classes (border-b-border, -mb-[2px], cursor-pointer, border-2, etc.)
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
userStories.notes:
In docs/components/retro-tabs.tsx, the trigger className (currently around line 107) is:
'border-b-border -mb-[2px] min-h-11 cursor-pointer border-2 border-transparent px-4 py-1 font-sans text-sm whitespace-nowrap transition-all focus:outline-none'

Change to:
'border-b-border -mb-[2px] cursor-pointer border-2 border-transparent px-4 py-1 font-sans text-sm whitespace-nowrap transition-all focus:outline-none'

Just remove min-h-11. Tab triggers are wide horizontal elements — they don't need 44px height to be tappable.

userStories.title: Fix heading spacing hierarchy in MDX components
userStories.description: As a reader, I want heading spacing to follow a clear hierarchy where h1 (page title) has less top margin than h2 (section divider), not more.
acceptanceCriteria: h1 in docs/mdx-components.tsx uses mt-8 mb-4 (restored from mt-12 mb-5)
h2 uses mt-12 mb-4 (restored from mt-10 mb-4)
h4 uses mt-4 mb-2 (restored from mt-6 mb-2)
h5 uses mt-4 mb-2 (restored from mt-6 mb-2)
h3 and h6 remain unchanged
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
userStories.notes:
In docs/mdx-components.tsx, fix these four heading overrides:

1. Line 90 h1: Change 'font-head mt-12 mb-5 text-2xl font-bold md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl' to 'font-head mt-8 mb-4 text-2xl font-bold md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl'

2. Line 95 h2: Change 'font-head mt-10 mb-4 text-xl font-semibold md:text-3xl lg:text-4xl' to 'font-head mt-12 mb-4 text-xl font-semibold md:text-3xl lg:text-4xl'

3. Line 105 h4: Change 'font-head mt-6 mb-2 text-xl font-normal' to 'font-head mt-4 mb-2 text-xl font-normal'

4. Line 110 h5: Change 'font-head mt-6 mb-2 text-lg font-normal' to 'font-head mt-4 mb-2 text-lg font-normal'

The hierarchy should be: h1 (mt-8, page title) < h2 (mt-12, section divider) > h3 (mt-8) > h4/h5 (mt-4). h1 is the page title that appears right after breadcrumb — it should not have the largest top margin.

userStories.title: Restore inline code border-2 and py-0.5 padding
userStories.description: As a reader, I want inline code to have consistent 2px borders (matching the RetroUI design system) and sufficient vertical padding at all screen sizes.
acceptanceCriteria: Inline code in docs/mdx-components.tsx uses border-2 without any responsive breakpoint variant (not 'border sm:border-2')
Inline code uses py-0.5 (not py-px)
All other inline code classes remain unchanged (bg-muted, border-border, px-1.5, font-mono, text-sm, font-semibold, break-words)
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
userStories.notes:
In docs/mdx-components.tsx around line 157, change:
'bg-muted border-border border px-1.5 py-px font-mono text-sm font-semibold break-words sm:border-2'
to:
'bg-muted border-border border-2 px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm font-semibold break-words'

Two changes: (1) 'border ... sm:border-2' → 'border-2' — the RetroUI design uses border-2 consistently everywhere, no mobile exception. (2) 'py-px' → 'py-0.5' — 1px vertical padding is too tight, 2px (py-0.5) gives the text room to breathe.

userStories.title: Restore hero heading size on tablets
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the hero heading to be bold and impactful on tablet screens, not downsized to regular heading size.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero h1 in docs/app/page.tsx uses 'text-3xl sm:text-5xl md:text-7xl' (not 'text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-7xl')
Hero description p uses 'text-base md:text-xl' (not 'text-base md:text-lg lg:text-xl')
No other changes to page.tsx
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
userStories.notes:
In docs/app/page.tsx:

1. Line 51 hero h1: Change
'font-head mb-6 text-3xl leading-tight font-bold sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-7xl'
to
'font-head mb-6 text-3xl leading-tight font-bold sm:text-5xl md:text-7xl'

2. Line 56 hero description: Change
'text-muted-foreground mb-8 max-w-2xl font-sans text-base md:text-lg lg:text-xl'
to
'text-muted-foreground mb-8 max-w-2xl font-sans text-base md:text-xl'

The hero section is full-width (no sidebar). The heading at md (768px) should be text-7xl (4.5rem) — that's the impactful hero size. The over-smoothed 4-step scale (3xl → 4xl → 5xl → 7xl) makes it look timid on tablets.
